description: Google People API provides access to profile, contacts, other contacts, and Google Workspace directory data for a user. It is used to read and manage people-related information tied to Google accounts and Workspace domains.
summary: people.googleapis.com exposes a People REST API and a remote MCP server; both require Google-issued credentials, with the REST API accepting either an API key or OAuth 2.0 access token and the MCP server using OAuth 2.0.
